notes: FROZEN: codex has a blocking approval gate (--ask-for-approval untrusted) but the held gate is a live protocol/TUI state (waitingOnApproval) never written to the watched rollout JSONL; the most the daemon sees is a normal open exec_command function_call, which classifies as working, never waiting (no hook→rule0 dead; exec_command not in NeedsUserAttention or OpenToolStalled tool sets). daemon=incapable → no recording. No phases beyond meta.
